name: pptx-mcp
summary: AI-powered PowerPoint (.pptx) generation, editing, and review via MCP — 42 tools, 53 slide types (exec summary, scorecard, testimonial, pricing, sensitivity, tornado, heatmap, bridge, quiz, persona, journey, impact metrics, more), 12 chart types, 8 diagrams, 12 branded presets, 34 archetypes, 8 variant groups, icon pack, financial-table primitives, and a 33-rule review engine with WCAG a11y, MECE/parallelism, data-provenance, auto-fix
author: swak
